title: Add column move button on task detail page — move task to next/previous column
acceptance_criteria: Task detail page shows 'Move to [Next Column]' button when the task is not in the 'done' column
Task detail page shows 'Move to [Previous Column]' button when the task is not in the 'todo' column
Clicking 'Move to [column]' calls PATCH /api/vault/tasks/:id with a column update and refreshes the page
After a successful column move, the task detail page reflects the new column in the status area
The button is disabled while the API call is in flight (loading state)
completion_summary: Added previous/next column controls on task detail using the task PATCH API with in-flight disable state and shared task action helpers.
